name: music-portfolio
description: A responsive HTML/CSS portfolio page for showcasing your music projects.

scripts.lint: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['index.html','project.html'].forEach(f => { const html=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); const scripts=html.split('<script>').slice(1); scripts.forEach((s,i) => { const code=s.split('</script>')[0]; try{new Function(code); console.log(f+': script '+i+' OK'); }catch(e){console.log(f+': script '+i+' ERROR: '+e.message);}}); });"
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint
